feedback: If Red was in a situation where Red preferred the other fruit but took the one Green liked  it was assumed there would be a dislike. However if Purple for instance was there and this choice changed  Red cared what Purple thought on how Red viewed Green. Where the same fruit was liked  if Red did not pick the apple  Red cared for Green. If Red still picked the apple it was less likely Red disliked Green due to shared preference  but likely a leaned a little towards dislike. The same logic would apply to Purple here.
